name.es: Pompe à l'huile (pan de Navidad provenzal)

description.en: A flat, slashed disc of olive-oil-and-orange-blossom dough, one of Provence's traditional thirteen Christmas desserts. It's torn apart by hand at the table, never cut, cutting it is said to bring bad luck for the year ahead.
description.de: Ein flacher, eingeschnittener Fladen aus Olivenöl-Orangenblüten-Teig, eines der traditionellen dreizehn Weihnachtsdesserts der Provence. Er wird am Tisch mit den Händen zerteilt, nie geschnitten, Schneiden soll für das kommende Jahr Unglück bringen.
description.es: Un disco plano y cortado de masa con aceite de oliva y azahar, uno de los trece postres tradicionales de Navidad de Provenza. Se parte a mano en la mesa, nunca se corta, cortarlo, según la tradición, trae mala suerte para el año que empieza.
description.fr: Un disque plat et entaillé de pâte à l'huile d'olive, l'un des treize desserts traditionnels de Noël en Provence. On la rompt à la main à table, jamais au couteau, la couper porterait malheur pour l'année à venir.

origin.note: Said to descend from olive-mill workers enriching the flour used to mop up the last virgin oil from the press with sugar and citrus zest. Central to the Provençal 'treize desserts' Christmas Eve tradition.

ingredients.note: estimated from a source described only as 'a glass'

keeping.note: Traditionally torn by hand rather than cut, an old superstition for luck in the coming year.

method.title: Start
method.summary: Mix part of the flour with the yeast and warm water; let it bubble about 45 minutes.

method.title: Mix the dough
method.summary: Work in the remaining flour, olive oil, sugar, salt and citrus zests to a smooth, rich dough.

method.title: Bulk ferment
method.summary: Ferment about 3 hours until well risen.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Press out into a flat disc roughly 30cm across on a tray.

method.title: Proof
method.summary: Proof about an hour near warmth.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake until golden, then brush immediately with olive oil while still hot from the oven.

source.adaptation: Source specified water only as 'a glass'; estimated at 220g.
